# ucode module
> **Total Context:** ~93147 tokens

- [c_source-api-module-debug.md](./c_source-api-module-debug.md) (4397 tokens) - No description
- [c_source-api-module-digest.md](./c_source-api-module-digest.md) (2040 tokens) - No description
- [c_source-api-module-fs.md](./c_source-api-module-fs.md) (11943 tokens) - Native filesystem access module for ucode. Implements robust, low-level POSIX-style operations including atomic file writes, directory traversal, file stat, and symbolic link management.
- [c_source-api-module-io.md](./c_source-api-module-io.md) (4766 tokens) - No description
- [c_source-api-module-log.md](./c_source-api-module-log.md) (5577 tokens) - No description
- [c_source-api-module-math.md](./c_source-api-module-math.md) (3156 tokens) - No description
- [c_source-api-module-nl80211.md](./c_source-api-module-nl80211.md) (4244 tokens) - No description
- [c_source-api-module-resolv.md](./c_source-api-module-resolv.md) (2586 tokens) - No description
- [c_source-api-module-rtnl.md](./c_source-api-module-rtnl.md) (9218 tokens) - No description
- [c_source-api-module-socket.md](./c_source-api-module-socket.md) (17280 tokens) - No description
- [c_source-api-module-struct.md](./c_source-api-module-struct.md) (7885 tokens) - No description
- [c_source-api-module-uci.md](./c_source-api-module-uci.md) (8826 tokens) - Unified Configuration Interface (UCI) bindings for ucode. Provides a comprehensive API for reading, writing, and applying OpenWrt system configurations directly from ucode scripts.
- [c_source-api-module-uloop.md](./c_source-api-module-uloop.md) (8838 tokens) - ucode bindings for the OpenWrt uloop event loop. Enables asynchronous programming, recursive timers, network socket monitoring, and child process management within ucode scripts.
- [c_source-api-module-zlib.md](./c_source-api-module-zlib.md) (2391 tokens) - No description
